# CreateMessageResult.ResultType property

REQUIRED on emit (spec §21.2.8, R-21.2.8-e; §3.6): the base result-type discriminator. A sampling completion is always `"complete"`. Defaults to `"complete"` so a constructed result is well-formed, and so an inbound result that OMITS `resultType` degrades to `complete` per the §3.6 receiver rule rather than failing to bind.

```csharp
public string ResultType { get; set; }
```
